query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_interacoes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN i.tipo = 'ligacao' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ligacoes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN i.tipo = 'whatsapp' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as whatsapp,
  DATE(i.createdAt) as data
FROM interacoes i
JOIN users u ON i.corretorId = u.id
WHERE (u.name LIKE '%Leticia%' OR u.name LIKE '%Letícia%')
  AND DATE(i.createdAt) = CURDATE()
GROUP BY DATE(i.createdAt);

  DATE(i.createdAt) as data
FROM interacoes i

WHERE (u.name LIKE '%Leticia%' OR u.name LIKE '%Letícia%')
